pullRequests.title: fix(terminal): force UTF-8 client mode on tmux attach
pullRequests.displayTitle: Force UTF-8 client mode on tmux attach
bodySummary: Root-causes and fixes the garbled box-drawing/underscore rendering symptom.

tmux attach-session infers UTF-8 client capability from LCALL/LCCTYPE/LANG in the attaching process's environment. AO's daemon typically runs without an interactive shell's locale, so tmux silently treats the attach client as non-UTF-8.

A non-UTF-8 client makes tmux's ttycheckcodeset (tty.c) replace any character it can't map through its legacy ACS table with underscores matching the glyph's display width. Common box-drawing glyphs (│ ─ etc.) are in that ACS table, so they…

bodySummary: Fixes 987 — posixspawnp failure on npm install -g @composio/ao when node-pty's prebuilt binary doesn't match the user's Node.js version

The existing postinstall only did chmod +x on spawn-helper. Now it also verifies node-pty loads correctly, and if it doesn't (ABI mismatch from nvm/fnm/volta), rebuilds from source via npx --yes node-gyp rebuild
Uses npx --yes so node-gyp doesn't need to be a direct dependency of the published package

pullRequests.title: ci: fix deploy by using correct RSA SSH host fingerprint
pullRequests.displayTitle: Fix deploy by using correct RSA SSH host fingerprint
bodySummary: When GitHub Actions SSHs into the VPS, the server presents its public host key to prove its identity. A fingerprint is just a short hash of that public key — it's how you verify you're talking to the right server and not an impostor.
Without a pinned fingerprint, the SSH client connects with StrictHostKeyChecking=no, meaning it'll accept any server claiming to be your VPS (MITM risk).

pullRequests.title: fix: cache ps output across sessions to fix 51s dashboard load

bodySummary: findClaudeProcess() was calling ps -eo pid,tty,args once per session. On machines with 1150 processes, each ps takes 30-35s. With 18 sessions, /api/sessions took 51+ seconds.
Added a module-level TTL cache (5s) with in-flight promise deduplication so ps is called at most once per 5s window, shared across all concurrent findClaudeProcess() calls.
Reduced ps and tmux list-panes timeouts from 30s to 5s — stale process data isn't useful.

bodySummary: Follow-up to 26 — addresses the 3 remaining Bugbot review comments:

High: SSE stream permanently dies on transient service errors — Separated service errors (transient, skip and retry) from controller.enqueue() errors (stream closed, clear intervals). Previously any error killed the SSE stream permanently.

Medium: SSE polling sends per-session activity events unconditionally — Changed from sending N individual session.activity events per poll to a single snapshot event (matching the SSESnapshotEvent type already defined in types.ts).…

pullRequests.displayTitle: Don't report CI as failing for merged/closed PRs
bodySummary: getCISummary() in scm-github was returning "failing" whenever getCIChecks() threw — even for merged PRs where GitHub may not return check data
This caused the dashboard to show "CI failing" badges on sessions with merged PRs
Now checks PR state before fail-closing: merged/closed PRs return "none" instead of "failing"
